function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-01-17 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email write completed. Verification: attachment path was previously read; single attachment so ordering compliant; recipient matches canonical entity record; subject with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md without tool-reported errors.

next_step.current_state: Task actions completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound resend draft, and removed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item and handled the invoice resend request. I verified the sender identity against the canonical cast record, confirmed the exact requested invoice (issued 2026-01-17 for Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH), created an outbound email draft in the outbox with that invoice attached, and then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context). Followed workflow: read process-next-inbox-item, selected lowest inbox filename, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbound record shape, then deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical evidence supports full completion: sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matches `10_entities/cast/nina.md`; requested invoice details match `50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md`; outbound record was written to `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md`; processed inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
